target: 8. A Place Where Two Can Meet
(I ended up coming here... again.)
Even so... what is this?
Whenever I come to this beach, all sorts of emotions wash over me one after another.
It feels a bit scary somehow, but...
It feels like everything started from here... It gives me this nostalgic feeling too.
Yeah... This is a strange place.
Shinpei, you really did come.
I had a feeling... that you'd be waiting here.
Hehe, I wonder what this feeling is?
Who knows. I don't really get it either.
I see... Well, whatever it is, it's fine.
I was a bit anxious at first, but I've gradually gotten used to it...
But I'm still not satisfied with that other thing, okay?
Why do you have to go back to Tokyo so soon?
…Sorry.
I thought you'd stay here at least for the summer vacation.
Of course, I know that was just my own selfish assumption, but still.
But... I was looking forward to... spending a lot more time with you, Shinpei...
And yet, you're going back so soon. Shinpei, you're heartless.
I'm really sorry. But I actually cleared a lot of my schedule for this.
I have my part-time job, and there are assignments I have to do over the summer.
Once school starts, there will be a lot of exams and training, so I have to prepare for those too...
...Is it really that hard?
Yeah, that's why I can't stay for very long this time.
I get it. In the end, your life in Tokyo is more important to you than the island now, Shinpei.
Why does it have to be like that.
Do whatever you want. You're already a Tokyo person anyway.
My feelings, stuck here on the island, don't matter to you at all.
Ushio…
I really don't care anymore. Have a safe trip back to Tokyo.
(I don't really understand it myself either...)
(But I feel like if I don't convey these cloudy feelings inside me right now, I'm going to regret it a lot later...)
Hey, Ushio…
Hm, what is it?
About the reason why I went to Tokyo... How do I say this... I felt like I couldn't just stay the way I was.
What do you mean?
Hmm, I don't really know how to explain it myself either, but...
If you can't even explain it yourself, there's no way I'd be able to understand.
Ah~... how should I put this...
(Objective. I need to look at myself objectively at a time like this.)
(I wanted to go to Tokyo... No, the reason I wanted to leave this island.)
(Right, that was...)
It's because I felt like I was going to be left behind by you...
Huh? I don't plan on going anywhere, you know?
No, that's not what I meant! How do I say this, um...
You're the type to act without thinking ahead, right?
I-I might do that sometimes. But it's not like I'm always like that, right?
(It's definitely not just 'sometimes'...)
And...?
Why does me being the type to act without thinking ahead lead to you going to Tokyo?
I can't explain it well, but... I think I just got anxious.
Eh... why?
Probably, from here on out, you'll keep sticking your nose into all sorts of things, gaining all sorts of experiences...
And while repeating successes and failures like that, you'll keep growing bigger and bigger...
A-And then... you...
You would become an existence out of my reach. That anxiety kept growing bigger and bigger...!
What are you talking about, out of reach? I'm always right next to you, Shinpei.
Always, you say...
(Ah... I see.)
(I wanted to stay by Ushio's side forever...)
(That's why…)
(I wanted to change myself, even just a little... Maybe that's what I thought.)
(In order to keep walking alongside Ushio, from now on and forever...)
No no no no!
W-What is it all of a sudden!?
(If what I just thought was my true feelings, then that's just like――)
What's wrong? Your face is bright red, you know?
A-Anyway, just remember this! Someday, definitely...!
Y-yeah…
I-I don't know how many years from now it'll be, but...!
(H-How am I supposed to continue after this!? 'I'll become a man worthy of you'? 'I'll come back for you'?)
(Both feel like the right answer... But also kind of not...)
(Wait, there's no way I could say lines like that, they're way too embarrassing!)
Shinpei, are you okay? You're acting kind of weird today.
I-I'm fine! In the end, what I want to say is...
I'm gonna make a curry even more delicious than now, and make you say 'uncle'! That's... what I mean.
Shinpei…
W-What...?
I don't get it.
(Yeah, I agree...)
But, I feel like I understand a little bit.
You just wanted to move further and further ahead, didn't you, Shinpei.
(Yeah, so I wouldn't be left behind by you...)
(So I could live proudly by your side...)
W-Well, something like that. So, Ushio. I really don't know how many years it'll take, but――
M-Make sure you wait for me!
Yeah, got it! I'll be waiting and looking forward to it!
(Haa, I'm suddenly exhausted. But maybe I was able to sort out my feelings just now.)
(I kept telling myself to be objective, but I couldn't even sort out my own feelings...)
By the way, what are you doing tonight?
Ah, the summer festival…
What?
Ah... Somehow, I'm fine even when saying 'festival' now.
Yeah... What in the world was that.
Maybe we were just looking forward to the festival so much that we started acting weird.
No, that can't be it...
No, it could be. Because for you, Shinpei, it's your first festival in two years, right?
If that's the case, what was your reason?
That's…
A festival with you there is the first in two years for me too!
Well… that's true.
Of course you're going to the festival too, right, Shinpei?
This year, Mio, Tokiko, and I have decided to wear yukata.
Hmm, what should I do? Sou hasn't invited me either.
You have to go too, Shinpei! Did you forget our promise!?
A promise?
Your promise to buy me 10 or even 100 takoyaki!
Eh? Did I make a promise like that!?
You definitely did!
Hmmm...?
But… now that you mention it…
I do feel like I might have made a promise like that?
But 100 of them, huh. You really look like you could eat that many...
If takoyaki is no good, I'm willing to settle for curry, you know?
You're gonna make a curry even more delicious than now and make me say 'uncle', right?
Idiot, I can't make it that delicious so suddenly!
Then it's gotta be takoyaki after all.
I don't mind, but please spare me from buying 100.
Then I'll lower it to 90.
H-Hey now!!
Ahahahahaha!!
Key TIPS [<color=#GF_KEY_EPILOGIE_USI>epilogue: Ushio Kofune</color>] obtained.
